summary: Iteration 13 Testing: PWA (Progressive Web App) Features - All 43 backend tests + 12 frontend tests passed (100%). Tested manifest.json, sw.js, offline.html, 8 PWA icons, and all required meta tags. Service worker registers successfully in browser.
passed_tests: manifest.json returns 200 with correct JSON content type
manifest.json has name='Bruno Melito Hair Stylist'
sw.js returns 200 with JavaScript content type
offline.html returns 200 with HTML content type
All 8 PWA icons exist (72x72 to 512x512) - HTTP 200
All 8 PWA icons are PNG content type (image/png)
manifest-gestionale.json has correct theme_color and background_color
Main page has theme-color meta tag with #D4AF37
Main page has manifest link to manifest.json
Website renders correctly with root content
critical_code_review_comments: manifest.json: Properly configured with all required PWA fields including 9 icons with proper 'purpose' attributes (any, maskable)
sw.js: Implements stale-while-revalidate caching strategy, handles API routes separately, falls back to offline.html for navigation
offline.html: Self-contained with inline styles, uses Onyx & Gold dark theme, auto-reloads on connectivity restore
index.html: Has all required meta tags (theme-color, apple-mobile-web-app-capable, apple-touch-icon)
index.js: Service worker registration happens on window load event
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 tested PWA features: 1) manifest.json with 9 icons, gold theme #D4AF37, dark background #0B1120, display standalone, 2) sw.js with bruno-melito-v2 cache, install/fetch listeners, stale-while-revalidate strategy, 3) offline.html with Onyx & Gold theme showing 'Sei Offline' message, 4) All 8 icon sizes from 72x72 to 512x512 in /icons/ directory, 5) manifest-gestionale.json for admin panel, 6) Main page meta tags for PWA (theme-color, apple-mobile-web-app-capable, manifest link). Service worker registers successfully in browser console.
